schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Field/NXcrystal/type") ; schema1:value Literal("missing") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("d-spacing") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Field/NXcrystal/d_spacing") ; schema1:value Literal("1,1,1") ] ; schema1:additionalType Literal("nxs:BaseClass/NXmonochromator") ; schema1:name Literal("Si 111") ], [ rdf:type schema1:Product, schema1:Thing ; schema1:additionalProperty [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:value Literal("???") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("harmonic_rejection") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:harmonic_rejection") ; schema1:value Literal("Rh-coated mirror, detuned") ] ; schema1:additionalType Literal("xas:Beamline") ; schema1:identifier Literal("should have a registry with URIs") ; schema1:name Literal("13-BM-D") ] ] Result Path: schema1:name Message: An instrument must have a name with at least 3 characters.
